name: Site Health Monitor
coverage_areas: Homepage|Mens PLP|Womens PLP|Mens Apparel PLP|Womens Apparel PLP|Ghost 16 PDP|Adrenaline PDP|Account Login|Account Registration|Cart|Search|Shoe Finder
checks_performed: HTTP status check|Keyword validation|Response time measurement|Bot-bypass headless render
notes: 12 URLs monitored. Results appended to results.csv. Headless Chrome with CDP stealth patches.

name: DPO Site Health Dashboard
checks_performed: KPI band|Per-page status cards|Uptime history dots|Filterable check history
notes: Reads results.csv directly. No build step. Hosted on GitHub Pages.

name: LogicMonitor Site Checks
checks_performed: HTTP uptime check|Response time SLA|SSL certificate expiry|CDN availability|API response check
notes: Primary uptime monitoring platform. Alerts fire to PagerDuty on threshold breach. SLA tracked monthly.

name: LogicMonitor Alerting
checks_performed: Threshold-based alerting|PagerDuty escalation|On-call rotation|SMS and email notify
notes: P1 alerts page on-call within 2 min. P2 alerts email team. Weekly alert review cadence.

name: GitHub Actions Smoke Tests
checks_performed: Page load assertion|Element visibility check|Add-to-cart flow|Search result validation|Checkout render check
notes: Blocks deploy if smoke tests fail. Daily run catches overnight regressions.

name: GitHub Actions Link Checker
coverage_areas: Full site crawl up to 500 URLs
checks_performed: Broken link detection|404 identification|Redirect chain check
notes: Crawls brooksrunning.com and reports broken links to Slack. Excludes external domains.

name: GitHub Actions Performance Budget
checks_performed: Lighthouse score gate|LCP check|CLS check|INP check|Bundle size budget
notes: In development. Will gate deploys on Lighthouse score drop. Targeting LCP under 2.5s.

name: Tool Inventory Dashboard
checks_performed: CRUD inventory management|CSV export|Flat-file report download|Category and status filtering
notes: Single HTML file. Data in inventory.csv. Screenshot-friendly for stakeholder comms.

name: Akamai Bot Manager
checks_performed: Bot traffic detection|WAF rule enforcement|Rate limiting|DDoS mitigation
notes: Managed by Platform team. Rules reviewed quarterly. DPO team coordinates on changes affecting automated checks.

name: Akamai mPulse RUM
checks_performed: Real user LCP|Real user CLS|Real user TTFB|Bounce rate by performance segment|Geo performance breakdown
notes: Real-user monitoring. Complements synthetic checks. Monthly report shared with stakeholders.

name: Datadog APM
coverage_areas: API layer|Checkout service|Search service|Account service|Product catalog
checks_performed: Distributed tracing|Error rate tracking|Latency p95 and p99|Service dependency map|Anomaly detection
notes: Backend APM owned by Engineering. DPO team has read access for incident investigation.

name: Datadog Synthetics
checks_performed: Multi-step browser test|Transaction time tracking|Screenshot on failure|Alert on deviation
notes: Critical path synthetic monitoring. Owned by Engineering. Results shared in team Slack.

name: Datadog Log Management
checks_performed: Log aggregation|Error pattern detection|Search and filter|Retention policy enforcement
notes: Centralised log management. DPO team uses for incident triage. 30-day retention.

name: Splunk SIEM
coverage_areas: All application and infrastructure access logs
checks_performed: Security event correlation|Anomaly detection|Compliance reporting|Access log audit
notes: Owned by InfoSec. DPO team notified on anomalies affecting commerce flows.

name: New Relic Browser
checks_performed: JS error rate tracking|AJAX error monitoring|Page load breakdown|Session traces
notes: Frontend error monitoring. Catches JS exceptions in production. Weekly JS error review with Engineering.

name: Pingdom Transaction Monitor
checks_performed: End-to-end transaction check|Uptime alerting|Response time trend|Multi-location check
notes: Runs from 3 global locations. Alerts on transaction failure. Backup to LogicMonitor checks.

name: SSL Certificate Monitor
checks_performed: SSL expiry check|Certificate chain validation|HTTPS redirect check
notes: Alerts 30 and 7 days before expiry. Auto-renewal via Let us Encrypt where applicable.

name: CDN Performance Check
coverage_areas: Global CDN nodes|Image assets|JS and CSS bundles
checks_performed: Cache hit rate check|Edge node availability|Asset load time|Origin pull rate
notes: Monitors Akamai edge performance. Cache hit target over 90%. Alerts on origin pull spike.

name: Search Availability Check
coverage_areas: Site search endpoint|Search results page|Zero results rate
checks_performed: Search endpoint availability|Result count validation|Zero results detection|Spell-suggest check
notes: Part of Site Health Monitor suite. Validates search returns results for known queries.

name: Checkout Funnel Monitor
checks_performed: Cart render check|Checkout page availability|Add to cart keyword validation|Payment form presence
notes: Critical commerce path. Any failure triggers immediate Slack alert to DPO and Commerce teams.

name: Google Search Console Monitoring
checks_performed: Crawl error review|Index coverage check|Core Web Vitals field data|Manual actions check
notes: Weekly review by SEO team. DPO team alerted on crawl error spikes or manual actions.

name: GA4 Data Quality Check
checks_performed: Page view event validation|Add to cart event check|Purchase event validation|Session data completeness
notes: In development. Will alert on significant drop in tracked events indicating tag breakage.

name: Incident Runbook Library
checks_performed: Documented response procedures|Escalation contacts|Recovery steps|Post-mortem templates
notes: Living documentation. Runbooks exist for all P1 and P2 scenarios. Review after each incident.

name: PagerDuty On-Call Rotation
checks_performed: Alert routing|On-call scheduling|Escalation policy|Incident timeline
notes: Receives alerts from LogicMonitor and Datadog. 24/7 on-call rotation. Escalation to Eng Manager after 10 min no-acknowledge.

name: Slack Ops Alerting Channel
checks_performed: Real-time alert delivery|Check failure notifications|Deploy status updates|Daily summary digest
notes: #dpo-site-alerts channel. All automated check failures post here. Daily 9am digest of overnight checks.

name: Status Page
checks_performed: Public incident communication|Scheduled maintenance notices|Historical uptime display
notes: Planned. Will provide external transparency on site status. Integrate with PagerDuty for auto-updates.

name: Accessibility Audit
checks_performed: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance|Screen reader compatibility|Keyboard navigation|Colour contrast check
notes: Quarterly automated scan plus manual review. Results reported to Product and Engineering leads.

name: Third-Party Tag Audit
checks_performed: Tag inventory review|Tag firing validation|Page weight impact|Consent compliance check
notes: Monthly review of GTM container. Ensures no orphaned or duplicate tags affecting performance.

name: SSL Certificate Monitoring
checks_performed: SSL expiry check|Days-to-expiry alert|Certificate chain validation|HTTPS redirect check
notes: GitHub Actions workflow. Alerts team Slack channel 30 and 7 days before expiry. Auto-created issue on breach.

name: SSL Expiration Monitoring
checks_performed: SSL expiry monitoring|Certificate validity check|Multi-domain coverage|PagerDuty alert on critical threshold
notes: LogicMonitor native SSL check. Complements GitHub Actions check. PagerDuty alert when under 14 days.

name: Site Monitoring Dashboard for URLs
checks_performed: URL availability display|Response time trend|Uptime history|KPI summary|Per-page status cards
notes: Hosted on GitHub Pages. Reads results.csv from repo. No build step required. Screenshot-friendly.

name: Jira Release Dashboard
checks_performed: Release ticket tracking|Deployment status display|Release notes aggregation|Environment flag status
notes: Hosted on GitHub Pages. Provides release visibility across teams. Updated per release cycle.

name: SFCC and Jira Flag Dashboard
coverage_areas: SFCC feature flags|Jira release tickets|Environment configuration
checks_performed: Feature flag status display|SFCC job status|Jira ticket linkage|Environment diff view
notes: Tracks SFCC custom preference flags alongside Jira release tickets. Helps coordinate deploys and flag states.

name: Ratings Check for PLP Pages
coverage_areas: Mens Running Shoes PLP|Womens Running Shoes PLP|Mens Apparel PLP|Womens Apparel PLP
checks_performed: Ratings widget presence check|Star rating render validation|Review count display check|Ratings API response check
notes: Validates that ratings and review widgets render correctly on all key PLP pages. Alerts on widget absence.

name: Checkout Flow — Add to Cart Check
checks_performed: Add to cart button presence|Button keyword validation|Cart page load confirmation|Mini cart render check
notes: Critical commerce path check. Add to cart keyword validated on Ghost 16 and Adrenaline PDPs. Failure triggers immediate Slack alert.

name: URL Check — Home PDP PLP
coverage_areas: Homepage|Ghost 16 PDP|Adrenaline PDP|Mens Running Shoes PLP|Womens Running Shoes PLP
checks_performed: HTTP status check|Page load validation|Keyword presence check|Response time measurement|Bot-bypass render
notes: Core URL availability checks. Part of the site health monitor suite. Results stored in results.csv.

name: LogicMonitor Check — Sitecore URL
coverage_areas: Sitecore CMS endpoints|Content delivery URLs|Preview endpoints
checks_performed: HTTP availability check|Response time SLA|Status code validation|Sitecore health endpoint ping
notes: Monitors Sitecore CMS URLs for availability. Alerts Platform Team via PagerDuty on failure.

name: LogicMonitor Check — Home PDP PLP
checks_performed: HTTP uptime check|Response time tracking|Multi-location check|SLA breach alerting
notes: LogicMonitor synthetic checks running every 5 min from multiple locations. Backup to GitHub Actions checks.

name: LogicMonitor Check — Staging and Dev
checks_performed: Environment availability check|Staging URL health|Dev endpoint validation|Environment response check
notes: Monitors non-production environments to catch issues before promotion to production. Alerts dev team on failure.

name: JSM Alert — Cybersource Payment Service
coverage_areas: Cybersource payment gateway|Payment processing API|Tokenisation service|Fraud scoring service
checks_performed: Payment API availability alert|Transaction failure rate alert|Fraud score threshold alert|Gateway timeout detection|Payment decline rate spike
notes: JSM integration receiving Cybersource webhook events. Auto-creates P1 Jira tickets on payment gateway failure. Escalates to Platform and Commerce teams.

name: JSM Alert — SFCC Jobs
coverage_areas: SFCC custom job scheduler|Product import jobs|Price book sync|Inventory sync|Order export jobs
checks_performed: Job failure detection|Job timeout alert|Stuck job detection|Queue depth alert|Data sync validation
notes: JSM integration monitoring SFCC scheduled job execution. Auto-creates Jira tickets on job failure or timeout. Daily job health digest to DPO team.

name: JSM Alert — Klarna
coverage_areas: Klarna BNPL service|Klarna session API|Klarna order management
checks_performed: Klarna API availability alert|Session creation failure alert|BNPL option render check|Klarna widget load alert|Order capture failure detection
notes: JSM integration for Klarna buy-now-pay-later service. Alert fires when Klarna session creation fails or widget does not render on checkout.

name: JSM Alert — Constructor Search
coverage_areas: Constructor.io search API|Autocomplete service|Recommendation widgets|Browse API
checks_performed: Search API availability alert|Zero results rate spike|Autocomplete failure detection|Recommendation widget load alert|Browse API response time alert
notes: JSM integration for Constructor.io search and recommendations. Auto-creates Jira ticket on API failure or zero results rate exceeding threshold.

name: JSM Alert — Sitecore CMS
coverage_areas: Sitecore content delivery|CMS authoring environment|Content API|Media delivery
checks_performed: CMS availability alert|Content delivery failure|Publishing pipeline failure|Media CDN alert|Authoring environment health
notes: JSM integration for Sitecore CMS health events. Auto-creates Jira tickets on content delivery or publishing failures.

name: JSM Alert — Akamai CDN
coverage_areas: Akamai edge nodes|CDN cache layer|Image delivery|JS and CSS bundles
checks_performed: CDN edge failure alert|Cache purge failure detection|Origin pull spike alert|Asset delivery failure|DDoS event notification
notes: JSM integration receiving Akamai edge events. High-severity CDN failures auto-create P1 Jira tickets with impact scope.

name: JSM Alert — Order Management System
coverage_areas: Order management system|Order routing|Fulfilment API|Return processing
checks_performed: Order processing failure alert|Order routing failure|API timeout detection|Queue backlog alert|Return processing failure
notes: JSM integration monitoring OMS health events. Auto-creates Jira ticket on order processing failures or API timeouts exceeding threshold.

name: JSM Alert — TaxJar
coverage_areas: TaxJar tax calculation API|Tax reporting service|Checkout tax display
checks_performed: Tax API availability alert|Tax calculation failure|Incorrect tax response detection|Checkout tax display failure
notes: JSM integration for TaxJar tax calculation service used at checkout. Alerts on API failure or calculation errors which would block checkout completion.

name: JSM Alert — Narvar Returns
coverage_areas: Narvar returns portal|Returns API|Return label generation|Return status tracking
checks_performed: Returns portal availability alert|Return initiation failure|Label generation failure|Status update failure|Carrier webhook failure
notes: JSM integration for Narvar post-purchase and returns experience. Alerts DPO and Commerce teams on portal or API failures.

name: JSM Alert — Bazaarvoice
coverage_areas: Bazaarvoice ratings API|Review display widgets|Q and A widgets|PLP rating syndication
checks_performed: Ratings API availability alert|Widget load failure detection|Review syndication failure|PLP ratings display failure
notes: JSM integration for Bazaarvoice ratings and reviews. Alert fires when ratings API is unreachable or widgets fail to render on PDP and PLP pages.

name: JSM Alert — Braintree Payments
coverage_areas: Braintree payment gateway|PayPal checkout option|Venmo checkout|Payment tokenisation
checks_performed: Payment gateway availability alert|Tokenisation failure|PayPal session failure|High decline rate alert|Payment timeout detection
notes: JSM integration for Braintree payment gateway including PayPal and Venmo. Auto-creates P1 ticket on gateway failure or elevated decline rate.
